nasb.text: Yet Jeroboam the son of Nebat, the servant of Solomon the son of David, rose up and rebelled against his master,

esv.text: Yet Jeroboam the son of Nebat, a servant of Solomon the son of David, rose up and rebelled against his lord,

cnv.text: 可是大衛的兒子所羅門的僕人，尼八的兒子耶羅波安，卻起來背叛了他的主。

ccb.text: 尼八的儿子耶罗波安本是大卫的儿子所罗门的仆人，他却背叛他的主人，
